title: 10 best herbal teas for gum swelling
description: Licorice teas helps with gum swelling because it contains a compound called glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce inflammation and swelling in the gums. When consumed as a tea, licorice root extract can penetrate deep into the tissues of the mouth, reaching areas affected by gingivitis or periodontal disease. The antiseptic and antimicrobial properties of glycyrrhizin also aid in combating bacterial infections that can cause gum inflammation. As a res...
